method: logreg meta-learner over LightGCN + Stage2(mean_z, itemknn_bm25_top3, ease1000, als_popa2) + within-user z/rank + log_pop + cand_count; pooled-val train, per-user top-half decode
honest_validation: user-level GroupKFold OOF +0.00907, leakage gap 3e-5 (passed leakage check but DID NOT transfer)
failure_hypothesis: meta-learner exploited validation negative-sampler artifacts (log_pop weight -0.42, within-user Stage2 z) that correlate with constructed sqrtpop/popbin/recent negatives but NOT with the true hidden-test negative distribution; single robust LightGCN generalized better
correlation_policy: do NOT resubmit any LightGCN+Stage2 meta-learner that leans on popularity/within-user-Stage2 features without an out-of-distribution negative-sampler validation; honest GroupKFold alone is insufficient gating here

method: emb128_L4_reg1e-3 4-seed full-test score, within-user z, plus OTTO source co-visitation residual 0.090*z_coplay_top5_mean + 0.040*z_reverse_recent, per-user top-half decode
failure_hypothesis: The OTTO residual is a real but weak positive relative to the emb128 backbone; it does not provide enough independent signal beyond the stronger rank/capacity/ALS blend current best. Fresh split seed2718 was negative, matching the public outcome of not beating current best.
correlation_policy: Do not escalate same-panel tuned OTTO co-visitation/reverse_recent weights unless a fresh independent panel passes strict gate versus the current live-best anchor, not only versus emb128; diagnostic p-values are insufficient when min split delta is negative.

method: current-best emb128+emb192 rankblend plus validation-only ALS residual score_als_f32_it30_alpha20_popa4 with boundary gating; pre-registered atlas top row weight=0.30 band=2 was checked on fresh uniform split seeds 314/2025/2718
failure_hypothesis: Same-panel atlas overestimated effect size. Fresh independent panel kept a weak positive mean but one split went negative, mean delta stayed below +0.0015, and pooled p=0.129 was not significant. The diagnostic w0.20 band1 row was 3/3 positive but still below effect-size threshold, so it is research signal only, not a candidate.
correlation_policy: Do not materialize or submit same ALS f32 alpha20 popa4 residual/boundary-gating retunes unless a new pre-registered independent panel passes strict gate versus current rankblend: mean>=+0.0015, min>=0, 3/3 positive, fixes>breaks, p<0.05. Same-panel or diagnostic rows are insufficient.

method: Validation-only wide audit of popularity, ItemKNN, BM25/TF-IDF ItemKNN, EASE and EASE-HTR across three uniform splits.
failure_hypothesis: Training-free item-item CF is much weaker than the LightGCN backbone and cannot explain the 0.78795 public-LB gap.
correlation_policy: Do not expand EASE/ItemKNN/BM25/TF-IDF grids unless a new non-graph side-information source is introduced; current family is closed as underpowered.

method: Validation-only GF-CF spectral probe using normalized item-item graph filter P, ideal low-pass components, and P + gamma*idl(k), with z/rank blend checks against emb128.
failure_hypothesis: GF-CF is stronger than ItemKNN/EASE but remains below the emb128 LightGCN reference and highly correlated with it; the seed42 smoke near-tie did not survive three splits.
correlation_policy: Treat GF-CF/BSPM/PPR/heat-kernel item-item spectral filters as closed unless a future pre-registered independent panel clears the current-rankblend strict gate.

method: Validation-only LightGCN transduction: add per-user teacher top-1 candidate as pseudo-positive edge, retrain emb128 L4 reg1e-3 student on three uniform splits and four student seeds.
failure_hypothesis: High-confidence top-1 pseudo positives did not create stable lift; gains appeared in only some seed/split combinations and mean delta was effectively zero.
correlation_policy: Do not materialize full-test pseudo-label candidates from unfiltered top-1 transduction. Require mean delta >= +0.005 and worst split/run not below the predeclared loss floor before reopening.

method: Validation-only late checkpoint prediction averaging for emb128 L4 reg1e-3 LightGCN at epochs 120/140/160/180/200, evaluated as single checkpoints and late averages across three uniform splits and four seeds.
failure_hypothesis: Late checkpoint averaging only recovered noise-scale variation; best mean lift was +0.000067, far below the +0.0015 SWA gate, and one or more splits regressed.
correlation_policy: Do not reopen SWA/checkpoint averaging unless combined with a genuinely new backbone or representation shift that first passes its own independent validation gate.

method: Validation-only score-margin-filtered top-1 pseudo-positive transduction at min_margin 1.5 and 2.5, three uniform splits and four student seeds.
failure_hypothesis: Raising pseudo-label precision from 0.84 to 0.91/0.94 reduced coverage and worsened average accuracy; pseudo labels reinforce teacher bias or perturb graph training rather than adding orthogonal signal. Seed7 split was consistently negative.
correlation_policy: Treat pseudo-label transduction as closed. Do not expand to top2/top3 because diagnostic precision drops further and top1/margin-filtered variants already failed multi-split gates.

method: boundary_specialist_v1 row-flip harness converted to a ridge-fast row-utility full-test candidate using panel20 emb128/emb192 LightGCN score coverage and boundary-band features; per-user top-half decode; band=300; forced only after explicit user request despite gate fail.
failure_hypothesis: Boundary proximity plus emb128/emb192 uncertainty features produced a small validation micro-gain but did not transfer to the public half. Public implied precision was about 0.432 on changed public rows, matching the earlier negative-control warning that boundary-family row flips overfit validation boundary artifacts.
correlation_policy: Treat boundary_v1 / ridge-fast / row-flip constrained candidates as closed. Do not generate another full-test boundary candidate unless a genuinely new independent feature source first passes scored panel20 gate: mean flip precision above transfer-adjusted top2/top1 gate, positive split ratio threshold, no severe negative split, and low overlap with public-failed boundary rows.

method: Validation-only UltraGCN-style propagation-free constraint-loss smoke: user/item embeddings trained with BPR ranking, pointwise positive/negative terms, and item-item cosine-neighbor constraints; emb_dim=128, seed=42, 80 epochs on uniform validation split.
failure_hypothesis: Removing propagation and replacing it with direct constraint losses produced decorrelation but not useful ranking strength. The solo score was far below both emb128 single-seed and emb128 4-seed references, and the 50/50 z-blend remained below the current backbone, so the orthogonality is weak-model noise rather than complementary signal.
correlation_policy: Treat this UltraGCN-style constraint-loss smoke as closed at the current design. Do not expand to a 3-split panel, seed ensemble, or full-test candidate unless a materially different constraint backbone first clears the seed42 smoke gate: solo near the emb128 single-seed reference and 50/50 z-blend > emb128 4-seed by more than +0.0007.

method: Validation-only local train-review semantic topology/profile smoke: fold-train-only review text builds TF-IDF/SVD item embeddings; user centroids over positive item semantic embeddings score validation candidates; variants include binary/hour-weighted centroids, residualization against LightGCN/log-popularity, and small predeclared blends with emb128 4-seed base.
failure_hypothesis: Train-review semantics are available and fully cover validation candidates, but the resulting semantic-only ranking solves a different and much weaker problem than played top-half prediction. The tiny best blend lift (+0.000500) is below the seed42 escalation threshold and has non-significant fixes/breaks, so it is local noise rather than a candidate signal.
correlation_policy: Treat TF-IDF/SVD local-review semantic topology/profile as closed. Do not escalate to panel, Qwen3/LLM reranker, or full-test materialization unless a materially stronger train-only semantic encoder first clears the seed42 gate: solo >= 0.7350, 50/50/base blend improvement > +0.0007, fixes > breaks, and no head-popularity-only lift; external Steam metadata, appid reverse mapping, external review scraping, and hidden/test labels remain forbidden.

method: Validation-only BM25-weighted Logistic Matrix Factorization one-shot: fold-train binary user-item matrix weighted with implicit.nearest_neighbours.bm25_weight(K1=100,B=0.8), implicit.cpu.lmf.LogisticMatrixFactorization(factors=64, iterations=50, regularization=0.6, neg_prop=30, seed=42), validation candidate dot-product scoring, per-user top-half decode, and fixed 50/50 within-user z-blend with emb128 4-seed base.
failure_hypothesis: The Dacon-proven BM25+LMF recipe did not transfer to this fixed-candidate played prediction setting. It produced decorrelated scores, but solo accuracy was far below the 0.735 smoke floor and the 50/50 z-blend regressed by about 0.0300 against the emb128 4-seed base; fixes/breaks were strongly negative across item-degree buckets.
correlation_policy: Treat BM25+LMF as closed for this competition unless a materially different LMF formulation first clears the same seed42 smoke gate without a grid: solo >= 0.735, fixed blend delta > +0.0007 versus emb128 4-seed, fixes > breaks, corr_z <= 0.95, and no failed-family/head-only guard failure. Do not expand to multi-split panel or full-test materialization from this failed one-shot.

method: Validation-only BiVAE/RecVAE-style user-row reconstruction one-shot: fold-train binary user-item matrix, residual encoder with hidden=600 latent=200 dropout=0.3, multinomial reconstruction loss with beta warmup to 0.15 plus latent L2, 120 CPU epochs, validation candidate decoder-logit scoring, per-user top-half decode, and fixed 50/50 within-user z-blend with emb128 4-seed base.
failure_hypothesis: The Dacon-observed BiVAE/RecVAE family does not provide enough ranking strength in this fixed-candidate played prediction setting. The RecVAE-style user-row model was stronger than the previous BM25+LMF one-shot but still below the 0.735 solo smoke floor, and the fixed 50/50 z-blend regressed by about 0.0191 against the emb128 4-seed base with negative fixes/breaks across item-degree buckets.
correlation_policy: Treat this RecVAE/BiVAE-style user-row smoke as closed at the current one-shot design. Do not expand to panel, seed ensemble, dependency-heavy Cornac BiVAE, or full-test materialization unless a materially different autoencoder formulation first clears seed42: solo >= 0.735, fixed blend delta > +0.0007 versus emb128 4-seed, fixes > breaks, corr_z <= 0.95, and no head-only guard failure.

submission_purpose: user-approved remaining-quota non-duplicate burn; not a score-improvement gate pass

method_families.slot1: TAGCF smoke graph-family lottery; largest non-duplicate TAGCF variant
method_families.slot2: Pure ALS CF baseline distinct from rankblend/ALS-residual submissions
method_families.slot3: Pure itemKNN BM25 max baseline; high row-diff classical CF hedge
method_families.slot4: RRF popularity+itemKNN+EASE hybrid, distinct from pure ALS/itemKNN
method_families.slot5: Stage2 median-z blend baseline distinct from submitted mean-z baseline

failure_hypothesis: Large row-diff classical CF/TAGCF/Stage2 candidates are far below the saturated LightGCN/rankblend graph signal; diversity without validation strength does not help private hedge.
correlation_policy: Do not reopen these submitted final5 burn families for score-seeking unless new side information or a substantially stronger validation signal appears; exact submitted files are closed.
